class.description: RGB dual-output pipeline: publishes raw image_raw (autonomy) AND on-chip H.264 image_raw/compressed (telepresence) from one OAK ColorCamera.video output simultaneously. No host encode, no new snap interface.
RGB + depth dual output (DRAFT, requires a stereo OAK): RGBDual plus a depth node publishing depth 16UC1 raw (autonomy) and disparity grayscale H.264 view (telepresence). Unverified on OAK-1.
